herbs.herb_desc: Acorus calamus powder, also known as calamus powder, is derived from the rhizome of the Acorus calamus plant and is commonly used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies. The powder is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular ingredient in various health supplements and skincare products. Additionally, it is believed to have a calming effect on the nervous system, promoting relaxation and reducing stress.

Alpinia officinarum powder, also known as galangal powder, is a spice made from the dried and ground root of the Alpinia officinarum plant. Native to Indonesia and Southeast Asia, this powder is commonly used in traditional medicine and as an ingredient in various culinary dishes, particularly in Indonesian and Malaysian cuisine. The powder has been found to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular natural remedy for digestive issues and other health concerns.
